perturbation.original_text: 1.12. LeadersOnline-VerticalNet Revenue shall mean the total gross fees received by LeadersOnline from VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients for the use of LeadersOnline Services, exclusive of taxes and expense reimbursements.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.12. LeadersOnline-VerticalNet Revenue shall mean the gross fees received by LeadersOnline from any clients for the use of LeadersOnline Services.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase 'VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients' and replacing it with 'any clients', the definition of LeadersOnline-VerticalNet Revenue is broadened significantly. Originally, this revenue applied only to clients who initially accessed LeadersOnline Services through a VerticalNet link or promotion. Now, it seems to apply to revenue from *any* client, regardless of how they accessed LeadersOnline. This contradicts the revenue-sharing model outlined in Section 6.3, which is specifically tied to VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6.3. Revenue Sharing. 6.3.1. LeadersOnline shall pay VerticalNet *** percent (***%) of LeadersOnline- VerticalNet Revenue, payable to VerticalNet on or before the fifteenth day of the calendar month immediately following the month in which Source: LEADERSONLINE INC, S-1/A, 4/27/2000 such revenue was received by LeadersOnline. Such payments shall be accompanied by a statement containing reasonable detail of the number of VerticalNet-Leaders Online Clients generated during the month, the type and number of transactions from which the LeadersOnline VerticalNet Revenue was derived, the total LeadersOnline VerticalNet Revenue for such period and the total fees payable to VerticalNet pursuant to this Section 6.3.1 [Revenue Sharing].
perturbation.justification: The changed text broadens the definition of 'LeadersOnline-VerticalNet Revenue' to include revenue from 'any clients' instead of only 'VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients'. This directly contradicts Section 6.3, which calculates revenue sharing specifically based on 'LeadersOnline- VerticalNet Revenue'. By changing the definition, the basis for revenue sharing is altered, leading to a clear inconsistency in the contract. The original definition in 1.12 directly ties the revenue to VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients. The changed definition removes this restriction. Therefore, the change breaks the consistency with Section 6.3 and creates a strong in-text contradiction as defined by Omissions - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 1.26. VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients shall mean the clients of LeadersOnline that utilize the LeadersOnline Services and pay commissions or other fees to LeadersOnline for the use of its Services, and make initial contact with the LeadersOnline Site through a Link from a VerticalNet Site or through direct access to the LeadersOnline Site if such access was prompted by information presented in a Banner, Newsletter Ad or Employer Spotlight containing information about the LeadersOnline Services.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.26. VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients shall mean the clients of LeadersOnline that utilize the LeadersOnline Services and pay commissions or other fees to LeadersOnline for the use of its Services.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase 'and make initial contact with the LeadersOnline Site through a Link from a VerticalNet Site or through direct access to the LeadersOnline Site if such access was prompted by information presented in a Banner, Newsletter Ad or Employer Spotlight containing information about the LeadersOnline Services.', the definition of the VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients is broadened. This creates an in-text contradiction because Section 6.3 [Revenue Sharing] and 6.5 [Guaranteed Revenues] still expect that, VerticalNet is going to be only compensated if the client arrives to LeadersOnline, from a VerticalNet Site.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6.3. Revenue Sharing. 6.3.1. LeadersOnline shall pay VerticalNet *** percent (***%) of LeadersOnline- VerticalNet Revenue, payable to VerticalNet on or before the fifteenth day of the calendar month immediately following the month in which Source: LEADERSONLINE INC, S-1/A, 4/27/2000 such revenue was received by LeadersOnline. Such payments shall be accompanied by a statement containing reasonable detail of the number of VerticalNet-Leaders Online Clients generated during the month, the type and number of transactions from which the LeadersOnline VerticalNet Revenue was derived, the total LeadersOnline VerticalNet Revenue for such period and the total fees payable to VerticalNet pursuant to this Section 6.3.1 [Revenue Sharing].
perturbation.justification: The original text defined VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients as those who access LeadersOnline through a VerticalNet link or a VerticalNet-related advertisement. The changed text broadens this definition by removing this requirement. Section 6.3, the contradicted text, calculates revenue sharing based on VerticalNet-Leaders Online Clients, implicitly assuming that these clients originate from VerticalNet sources. By broadening the definition, the changed text creates a contradiction because VerticalNet may now be compensated for clients who have no connection to VerticalNet, which conflicts with the revenue-sharing agreement detailed in section 6.3. The change creates a scenario where LeadersOnline may be required to share revenue with VerticalNet for clients that were not generated by VerticalNet, directly contradicting the intended scope of the revenue-sharing agreement.

perturbation.original_text: 6.5. Guaranteed Revenues. VerticalNet agrees to guarantee that, during the initial Term of this Agreement, LeadersOnline shall earn LeadersOnline- VerticalNet Revenue of at least *** Dollars ($***) (the "Guaranteed Amount"), subject to the provisions of this Section 6.5 [Guaranteed Revenues]. *** Within thirty (30) days after the end of the initial Term, LeadersOnline shall submit a statement showing a reasonably detailed accounting of the LeadersOnline-VerticalNet Revenue received during the initial Term (or earned during the initial Term and paid within 30 days thereafter) along with payment of all such amounts up to the Guaranteed Amount. In the event this Agreement is terminated in accordance with Section 7.1 [DEFINITIONS], LeadersOnline shall make a payment of all amounts of LeadersOnline- VerticalNet Revenues received through the date of termination, up to the amount of the Guaranteed Amount ***.
perturbation.changed_text: 6.5. Guaranteed Revenues. VerticalNet agrees to guarantee that, during the initial Term of this Agreement, LeadersOnline shall earn LeadersOnline- VerticalNet Revenue of at least *** Dollars ($***) (the "Guaranteed Amount"), subject to the provisions of this Section 6.5 [Guaranteed Revenues]. Within thirty (30) days after the end of the initial Term, LeadersOnline shall submit a statement showing a reasonably detailed accounting of the LeadersOnline-VerticalNet Revenue. In the event this Agreement is terminated in accordance with Section 7.1 [DEFINITIONS], LeadersOnline shall make a payment of all amounts of LeadersOnline- VerticalNet Revenues received through the date of termination.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase 'received during the initial Term (or earned during the initial Term and paid within 30 days thereafter) along with payment of all such amounts up to the Guaranteed Amount' and the phrase 'up to the amount of the Guaranteed Amount', the requirements to fullfill the guaranteed ammount of the agreed revenues is removed. This contradicts that Section 1.26 is expecting that VerticalNet is going to be only compensated if the client arrives to LeadersOnline, from a VerticalNet Site.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1.26. VerticalNet-LeadersOnline Clients shall mean the clients of LeadersOnline that utilize the LeadersOnline Services and pay commissions or other fees to LeadersOnline for the use of its Services, and make initial contact with the LeadersOnline Site through a Link from a VerticalNet Site or through direct access to the LeadersOnline Site if such access was prompted by information presented in a Banner, Newsletter Ad or Employer Spotlight containing information about the LeadersOnline Services.
perturbation.justification: The original text in Section 6.5 guaranteed a minimum revenue amount and specified how LeadersOnline would account for and remit payments to meet that guarantee. The changed text removes the explicit requirement to account for revenues 'earned during the initial Term and paid within 30 days thereafter' and the phrase 'up to the amount of the Guaranteed Amount.' This omission weakens the mechanism for ensuring the Guaranteed Amount is met. This contradicts section 1.26 because, without the omitted language, VerticalNet is no longer explicitly compensated for clients that arrive to LeadersOnline from a VerticalNet Site, up to the Guaranteed Amount, creating a strong contradiction.
